subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the Wronged One unto those who desire to drink of the Kawthar of Life from the chalices of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المظلوم الی الذین ارادوا ان یشربوا کوثر الحیوان من کئوس عنایه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @living waters; water of life
